content.rendered:
Instructional Technologies for TESOL Classrooms


This online course presents and evaluates current technologies and their applications in the TESOL classroom, in urban distance learning, and in adult TESOL education. Participants learn strategies for overcoming technophobia among English teachers and learners. The computer is an effective classroom tool, and through methods’ instruction and hands-on practice, participants will learn the benefits of instructional technology for TESOL classes. 

 The technology course introduced me also to some of what was available in the market for VR teaching environments, along with the instructor’s encouragement, I was reassured that I have a unique product and service idea to offer in TESOL field.
